Thank you for your interest in instituting good governance practice in Meralco
If you are aware of any violation of the following corporate governance rules, committed by any our directors, officers or employees, related to the following:
Violation of the Corporate Governance Rules
Violation of the Code of Ethics and Company Code of Employee Discipline or other similar codes
Financial Malfeasance including those relating to financial fraud and questionable accounting and auditing matters
Kindly fill out the appropriate forms (click to download) and submit to any of the CG communication channels
Meralco values your privacy.
We collect your name, address, employee number, job title/position, company/office, contact number, email address, and signature solely to facilitate action on the Violation of Corporate Governance Rules and/or Retaliation Protection report you have submitted. These are accessed by Corporate Governance Office who hold such information under strict confidentiality. These are retained while any of the involved parties is employed in Meralco and shall be disposed of accordingly thereafter.
To know more about how we protect your data, visit
Privacy
. To exercise your data subject rights, contact
cdpo@meralco.com.ph
eReport Mo Form
Anti-Retaliation Form
Maintenance Schedule
July 28 - 29, 2026 - Quezon City (Novaliches)
Quezon City
BETWEEN 11:00PM (TUE., 07/28/26) AND 5:00AM (WED., 07/29/26) – PORTION OF CIRCUIT KAYBIGA 423YX
Portion of Pascual Road from Don Julio Gregorio St. to and including Chico, Ibayo 2, Ibayo – Maligaya and Maligaya Sts.; Arty 5 Subd. and Bernarty Subd. in Bgy. Sauyo.
Portion of Ibayo 2 St. from Pascual Road to and including Maligaya St. in Bgy. Bagbag.
REASON:
Line reconductoring works and replacement of poles along Don Julio Gregorio St. in Bgy. Sauyo, Novaliches, Quezon City.

July 28, 2026 - Laguna (Bay)
Laguna
BETWEEN 10:00AM AND 3:00PM – PORTION OF CIRCUIT SAN PABLO II 425WJ
Portion of Rizal Blvd. and F. T. San Luis Ave. from near Maharlika Highway in Bgy. San Feliz, Santo Tomas City, Batangas Province to and including Gomburza, Del Pilar, Lopez Jaena, Mabini and Rizal Sts.; MR Rubber Processing Services and Tianlong Cylinder (Philippines) Inc. in Bgy. Bitin, Bay, Laguna; Sito Jordan; Makati Development Corp. (MDC) Technology Center - San Felix, Makati Development Corp. (MDC) Forming Plant, MDC ConQrete Inc. (MCI) Batangas Batching Plant, DN Steel - Santo Tomas, Vine Dresser Inc., CWT88 Construction & Trading Corp. Batching Plant, Ultra Insulated Panel Systems Corp. (UIPSC) Plant, DESCO Inc., DYD Refrigeration Systems Inc. - Sto. Tomas and Jemco Realty & Development Corp. and Karzai Corp. Bgys. San Felix, San Vicente and Santa Elena.
REASON:
Relocation of facilities along Rizal Blvd. in Bgy. San Felix, Sto Tomas City, Batangas.
